description: product-tests job fails in CI on ubuntu-latest with no annotations, while all 737 tests pass locally in every configuration tested (clean env, PYTHONDEVMODE=1, -W error reveals 16 warnings but no errors).
reason: Likely CI runner environment difference — cannot reproduce locally across 5+ configurations
mitigation: All 737 tests pass locally (uv run pytest tests/unit/product -q)
governance-self-check, verify-native, ruff, governance-tests all pass in CI
This is a CI signal quality issue, not a code defect
Re-run CI job to check if transient
If persistent: add verbose output (remove -q) to CI step for diagnosis
review_trigger: Re-run CI product-tests job or push new commit
resolution_criteria: product-tests passes in CI or root cause identified with evidence
